#  Sign Up for Procore 
##  Background 
In order to use Procore's construction project management software, you must be added to a project by a company that is currently a Procore customer. If your company currently manages projects with Procore, please ask your organization's Procore Administrator to add you as a Procore user in the Procore directory. If you have been invited to use Procore on a project that is being managed by another company, you'll need to contact the Procore Administrator for that company or project.
##  Steps 
Once you have been added to a Procore Directory, you will receive a "Welcome to Procore" email. This email will provide you with a link to set up your Procore password and then you will be able to access Procore. If you are not affiliated with a company in Procore and would like to know more, please visit our website at [procore.com](https://www.procore.com/).
## See Also
  * [Why can't I log in to Procore?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-trouble-logging-in-to-procore)
  * [Do Procore's SSO integrations support single or multiple domains?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-do-procores-sso-integrations-support-single-or-multiple-domains)
  * [How can I use Procore's Toolbox Talk Sign-In PDF in my project's Forms tool?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-can-i-use-procores-toolbox-talk-sign-in-pdf-in-my-projects-forms-tool)
